UPSC Combined Medical Services CMS Admit Card 2026
tables: UPSC Combined Medical Services CMS Examination 2026 Admit Card

Union Public Service Commission UPSC has released the Combined Medical Services CMS Examination 2026. Those Candidate Are Interested to the Following Recruitment Can Apply Online from 11/03/2026 to 31/03/2026. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, age limit, pay scale and all other information.
Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination 2026 UPSC Advt. No. 09/2026-CMS :  Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 11/03/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 31/03/2026 upto 06 PM Pay Exam Fee Last Date: 31/03/2026 Exam Date : 02/08/2026 Admit Card Available : 24/07/2026

Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 200/- SC / ST / PH : 0/- (Exempted) All Category Female : 0/- (Nil) Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit / Credit Card or Net Banking or Pay the Examination Fee Through E Challan

UPSC CMS Notification 2026: Age Limit as on 01/08/2026 Minimum Age : NA Maximum Age : 32 Years. Candidates Must Have been Born Not Earlier than 02/August/1994. Age Relaxation Extra as per UPSC CMS 2026 Recruitment Rules
UPSC CMS Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 1358 Post
Medical Officers Grade in General Duty Medical officers Sub Cadre of Central Health Service
Passed / Appearing  Medical Degree in MBBS at Any Recognized  University in India. For More Details See Notification
Assistant Division Medical Officer ADMO in Railway
General Duty Medical Officer GDMO Grade II in NDMS
General Duty Medical Officer GDMO in Various Delhi Municipal Council

How to Fill UPSC CMSE 2026 Online Form Live Photo Required : Candidate Live Photo Required. To apply for Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2026 in Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), it will be necessary to do One Time Registration. Applications will not be accepted without OTR. The application window of UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2026 can be applied online from 11 March 2026 to 31 March 2026. The number of examination centers / cities remains limited in UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2026 recruitment, so if the candidate wants the examination city of his choice, then applies as soon as possible. After applying, the exam city which will be seen in red color means that that city is now full. After completing the application in UPSC Combined Medical Services Examination CMS 2026 Recruitment, take the final print out. for More Details Must Read the Notification.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full CMS 2026 Notification Before Apply Online
